statement.markdown: Given an array nums and a size n, insert a new element at the end of the array and then heapify it.
statement.inputFormat: The first line contains the size of the array n, followed by the next line containing n space-separated integers.
statement.notes: You don't need to implement the heapify function, just call it correctly.

hints.text: Check the call order between insert and heapify methods

editorial.title: Fix Heapify Insertion Bug
editorial.intuition: The correct approach is to call the insert method to add a new element to the heap and then call the heapify method to restore the heap property.
editorial.optimalSolution: To fix the bug, swap the order of insert and heapify method calls so that heapify is called first before inserting the new element.
commonMistakes: Mistaking the order of insert and heapify method calls

functionSignature.python:
def solve(self, nums: list[int], n: int):
    -> None:
